entries.title: Software Engineer
entries.summary: Production support and automation for AT&T systems.
details: Led production support for AT&T server infrastructure.
Designed and maintained a library of Bash scripts automating server monitoring and status updates.

entries.title: MS in Bioinformatics
entries.summary: Moved from software into computational biology.

entries.title: Research Assistant
entries.summary: SNPredict, RNA-Seq and ChIP-Seq workflow automation.
details: Designed and built SNPredict, a tool that predicts rare somatic variants using machine learning (kNN, LinearSVC).
Automated RNA-Seq and ChIP-Seq workflows with custom shell scripts.

entries.title: Bioinformatics Support Analyst
entries.summary: Clinical genomics workflows, NGS pipelines, and D3 visualization tools.
details: Built Flask web tools that automated the molecular diagnostics lab's bioinformatics workflow.
Monitored the clinical NGS workflow and developed variant calling and annotation pipelines.
Designed VIRAS, an interactive tool for analyzing nucleotide mismatches between patients — published in Biology of Blood and Marrow Transplantation.
Created d3.js visualization tools investigators used to explore NGS and patient report data.

entries.title: Programmer Analyst
entries.summary: Visualization and set operations tooling for Rat Genome Database.

entries.title: Bioinformatician
entries.label: Marquette University
entries.summary: Pipelines and web tools for axon growth research.
details: Solo developer for a lab working to cure spinal cord injury.
Built pipelines that discovered novel transcription factor combinations regulating axon growth — published in Nature Communications.
Created a web tool for visualizing ATAC-Seq, RNA-Seq, and histone ChIP-Seq data across stages of mouse development.
Built a site that visualizes and quantifies supraspinal neurons — part of work published in eLife.

entries.title: Data Scientist
entries.summary: Cancer mutation annotation app for oncologists.
details: Built a web app from scratch that identifies and annotates rare mutations in cancer patients.
Gave oncologists an interactive interface to track patients and discover appropriate treatments.

entries.title: Product Manager
entries.summary: iCare platform, oncology products, and bioinformatics teams.
details: Built and managed development of iCare — a platform that helps oncologists read patients' mutational profiles and match them to cancer therapies.
Led a team of software developers and bioinformaticians across iCare projects.
Designed the interfaces and bioinformatics pipelines behind flagship products OncoDx and OncoPredikt.
Owned deployments end to end, through every phase of the development lifecycle.

entries.title: Co-founder
entries.summary: Community for epistemic and personal growth.
details: Building a community space that pairs epistemic and emotional growth with inspiring impactful work on local and global catastrophic risks.

entries.title: Founder and Coach
entries.summary: Coaching for better decisions, resilience, and emotional awareness.

entries.title: Workshop Facilitator
entries.summary: Rationality workshops in Bangalore and Hyderabad.
details: Designed and ran 12 hands-on workshops in Bangalore and Hyderabad on thinking clearer, deciding better, and catching biases.
Talk and workshop at EAGx Delhi: the planning fallacy — why we underestimate time and how to fix it.
Calibration workshop at EAGx Bangalore, built around predicting famous psychology experiments with confidence intervals.

entries.title: Facilitator, Futurekind Fellowship
entries.summary: Futurekind Fellowship cohorts and AI tools for animal welfare.
details: Facilitating two Futurekind Fellowship cohorts.
Helping build AI tools for animal welfare as part of the Builder Track.
